CIGWebinar.webinarTitle: CIG, Your Gateway to SAP Ariba
CIGWebinar.webinarInfo: Join us for an exclusive webinar to explore how the Ariba Cloud Integration Gateway (CIG) seamlessly connects your SAP ERP (S/4HANA) with the Ariba Network. Discover how CIG centralizes and streamlines procurement transactions, simplifies integration management, and accelerates your journey to smarter, synchronized procurement operations.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Simplified Integration:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: How CIG bridges SAP ERP and Ariba effortlessly.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: CIG Architecture:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Dive into key components and how they work together.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Self-Service Portal:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Learn how to configure, test, and monitor integrations.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Real-World Use Cases:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Practical examples of how organizations benefit from CIG.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Implementation Best Practices:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Tips for faster deployment and effective error handling.

whoShouldAttendData: Anyone looking to simplify and optimize SAP Ariba integrations

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Introduction to SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Understand how Onboarding 2.0 transforms the new hire experience from pre-boarding to productivity.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Key Features & Comparative Analysis:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Explore what’s new in Onboarding 2.0 vs. 1.0, including smarter task flows, better customization, and enhanced user experience.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Step-by-Step Workflow & Implementation:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Get a clear roadmap of the ONB 2.0 implementation journey—from configuration to go-live.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Seamless Integration with Employee Central:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Discover how deep integration ensures data consistency and streamlined HR processes.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Smarter Task Management & Digital Tools:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Learn how dashboards, e-signatures, and task automation elevate the onboarding process.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Greater Admin Control & Customization:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Unlock new levels of flexibility with advanced business rules, notifications, and personalized workflows.

successFactorWebinar.webinarTitle: What’s New with SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0
successFactorWebinar.webinarInfo: Unveil the more efficient way of Employee Onboarding.Join us for an insightful webinar that illustrates the latest enhancements in SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0, aimed at improving the new hire experience from pre - boarding to day one and so on, and highlights how it transforms and streamlines the onboarding journey compared to its predecessor, SAP Onboarding 1.0.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Simplify SAP Transformation:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: How an integrated approach removes complexity.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Accelerate Cloud Adoption:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Strategies to migrate faster and smarter while minimizing technical debt.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Process Reimagination with SAP Signavio:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Unlock new efficiencies and innovation opportunities.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Tap into AI and Automation:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Enhance your SAP operations for smarter, autonomous workflows.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Live Demo:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: See the Voyager+ framework in action, supporting a smooth RISE with SAP journey.

whoShouldAttendData: Anyone planning or accelerating their RISE with SAP transformation
voyageWebinar.webinarTitle: Voyage with SAP – Transformational RISE with SAP Services by Rialtes
voyageWebinar.webinarInfo: Don’t miss this opportunity to join us for an exclusive webinar to explore how Salesforce Automotive Cloud is revolutionizing customer engagement in the auto industry. Discover how your teams can steer every customer interaction using data, AI, and automation—from lead to loyalty, all inside one connected platform.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: What is Agentforce?
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Understand the fundamentals of Agentic AI and how Agentforce stands apart from traditional bots.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Autonomous Task Execution:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: See how intelligent agents can complete tasks without manual intervention.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Human-like, Contextual Interactions:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Explore how Agentforce understands context, maintains conversation memory, and engages in natural, personalized conversations.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Seamless Integration with Your Tech Stack:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: how Agentforce easily plugs into your existing Salesforce ecosystem and other enterprise tools.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Real-World Impact & Bonus Capabilities:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: See how Agentforce delivers measurable value across industries and discover additional capabilities like multi-channel support, and AI-driven insight

whoShouldAttendData: Anyone looking to supercharge workflows with intelligent, agentic AI solutions

databricksWebinar.webinarTitle: Databricks and Datasphere — What’s in SAP Business Data Cloud ?

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Modern Data Challenge:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Understand today's enterprise data complexities and how SAP’s Cloud Vision addresses them.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Core Capabilities:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Dive into the features of Databricks and SAP Datasphere—and how they compare.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Seamless Integration:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Explore how SAP Datasphere and Databricks integrate with SAP systems and with each other.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Strategic Decision Factors:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Get a clear framework to shape your data strategy using SAP Business Data Cloud.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Live Demo:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Witness how unified data can unlock AI-driven insights in real time.

whoShouldAttendData: Anyone seeking to unify enterprise data and power AI initiatives

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Comprehensive Overview:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Understand the core capabilities of Salesforce Automotive Cloud and how it supports a connected customer journey in the automotive sector.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Introduction to the Automotive Cloud:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Learn how the platform addresses industry-specific challenges and use cases tailored to auto manufacturers, dealers, and mobility service providers.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Key Insights and Stakeholder Scenarios:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Explore how various stakeholders, from sales to service, can leverage Automotive Cloud for personalized engagement and seamless collaboration.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Unified Customer Data:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: See how you can unify every touchpoint across sales, service, marketing, and post-sale support for a 360° customer view.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Streamlined Sales & Service:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Experience smarter workflows and automation that enhance response times, reduce friction, and drive conversions.

whoShouldAttendData: Anyone seeking to deliver high-performance customer experiences in the auto industry

letsWhatsappWebinar.webinarTitle: Let’s WhatsApp in Salesforce with AgentChat
letsWhatsappWebinar.webinarInfo: Don’t miss this exclusive webinar to discover how AgentChat our native, bidirectional Salesforce WhatsApp integration, transforms the way your teams communicate, directly within Salesforce. Whether you're in Sales, Service, Marketing, or Field Operations, AgentChat brings seamless, real-time WhatsApp conversations to your CRM environment.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Cross-Cloud Compatibility:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: How AgentChat works across every Salesforce Cloud—from Sales and Service to Marketing and Field Ops.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Faster Customer Response Times:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Reduce delays and close conversations faster.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Workflow Automation:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Trigger tasks, alerts, and records based on chat actions.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Features and Benefits:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Explore the core capabilities of AgentChat and the real-world impact they deliver.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Live Demo:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: See AgentChat in action and how Salesforce WhatsApp integration fits into your current Salesforce setup.

whoShouldAttendData: Anyone looking to improve customer engagement within Salesforce
